items.title: Composition and inheritance: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? Inheritance is required whenever two objects share any behavior.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Prefer composition for has-a collaboration and inject narrow capabilities instead of inheriting solely for reuse.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Prefer composition for has-a collaboration and inject narrow capabilities instead of inheriting solely for reuse.
